controls.title: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
controls.description: Actively manage all enterprise assets connected to the infrastructure.

controls.title: Inventory and Control of Software Assets
controls.description: Actively manage all software on the network so only authorized software is installed.

controls.title: Data Protection
controls.description: Develop processes and technical controls to identify, classify, securely handle, retain, and dispose of data.

controls.title: Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software
controls.description: Establish and maintain the secure configuration of enterprise assets and software.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Use processes and tools to assign and manage authorization to credentials for user accounts.

controls.title: Access Control Management
controls.description: Use processes and tools to create, assign, manage, and revoke access credentials and privileges.

controls.title: Continuous Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Develop a plan to continuously assess and track vulnerabilities on all enterprise assets.

controls.title: Audit Log Management
controls.description: Collect, alert, review, and retain audit logs of events.

controls.title: Email and Web Browser Protections
controls.description: Improve protections and detections of threats from email and web vectors.

controls.title: Malware Defenses
controls.description: Prevent or control the installation, spread, and execution of malicious applications.

controls.title: Data Recovery
controls.description: Establish and maintain data recovery practices sufficient to restore in-scope enterprise assets.

controls.title: Network Infrastructure Management
controls.description: Establish and maintain the secure configuration of network infrastructure.

controls.title: Network Monitoring and Defense
controls.description: Operate processes and tooling to establish and maintain comprehensive network monitoring and defense.

controls.title: Security Awareness and Skills Training
controls.description: Establish and maintain a security awareness program for all workforce members.

controls.title: Service Provider Management
controls.description: Develop a process to evaluate service providers who hold sensitive data or are responsible for IT platform or processes.

controls.title: Application Software Security
controls.description: Manage the security life cycle of in-house developed, hosted, or acquired software.

controls.title: Incident Response Management
controls.description: Establish a program to develop and maintain an incident response capability.

controls.title: Penetration Testing
controls.description: Test the effectiveness and resiliency of enterprise assets through identifying and exploiting weaknesses.

controls.title: CIS 16 � Application Software Security
controls.description: Secure development standards covering agentic integrations � input validation, goal-state verification; Secure development standards covering LLM integration � input validation, context separation

controls.title: CIS 18 � Penetration Testing
controls.description: Adversarial testing covering goal hijack � direct, indirect, multi-turn injection scenarios; Adversarial testing programme covering prompt injection scenarios

controls.title: CIS 8 � Audit Log Management
controls.description: All agent inputs logged � injection attempts detectable through log analysis; Memory write operations logged � who or what wrote, when, content hash; Comprehensive audit logging of all agent actions � no production deployment without full observability

controls.control_id: 13.8 Deploy a network intrusion detection solution
controls.title: CIS 13 � Network Monitoring and Defence
controls.description: Network-layer monitoring for injection indicators in agent traffic

controls.title: CIS 5 � Account Management
controls.description: Agent tool access managed as privileged access � minimum scope, regular review; Agent credentials managed as privileged accounts � minimum scope, regular review, JIT issuance; Approval flows independent of agent interface � sensitive approvals cannot be completed via agent chat

controls.title: CIS 6 � Access Control Management
controls.description: Formal process for granting agent tool access � documented justification per tool; Formal process for granting LLM tool access � documented justification required

controls.title: CIS 8 � Audit Log Management
controls.description: All tool invocations logged � tool identity, parameters, agent identity, timestamp; All credential operations logged � issuance, use, anomalous patterns detectable; All A2A messages logged � sender identity, content hash, timestamp, schema validation results

controls.title: CIS 16 � Application Software Security
controls.description: Tool parameter validation as secure development requirement; Sandbox, static analysis, and allowlist as secure development requirements for code execution; Memory write validation as secure development requirement � untrusted sources cannot write directly

controls.title: CIS 6 � Access Control Management
controls.description: Agent credential revocation process � immediate revocation on detection, decommission procedure

controls.title: CIS 3 � Data Protection
controls.description: Agent credentials encrypted at rest � secret manager, no cleartext storage; Agent memory stores encrypted at rest � embeddings, long-term memory, operational knowledge; Embeddings, training data, and RAG caches containing sensitive data encrypted

controls.title: CIS 2 � Inventory and Control of Software Assets
controls.description: ML SBOM as software asset inventory � all agent components (tools, MCP servers, models, libraries)

controls.title: CIS 7 � Continuous Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Agent component CVEs in vulnerability management � urgent patching for code execution risks; Vulnerability management process covers LLM component CVEs and dependency risks

controls.control_id: 16.6 Use only up-to-date and trusted third-party components
controls.title: CIS 16 � Application Software Security
controls.description: Approved component list � only sourced from approved vendors, signatures verified; Only approved, verified LLM components used in production � unsigned components rejected

controls.title: CIS 15 � Service Provider Management
controls.description: Agent tool and MCP providers managed as service providers � security assessment before onboarding

controls.title: CIS 4 � Secure Configuration
controls.description: Secure configuration includes code execution sandbox � no defaults permitting unrestricted execution; Secure configuration includes circuit breakers and rate limits � cascade prevention as configuration requirement; Secure configuration for LLM deployments � system prompts not in cleartext config

controls.title: CIS 18 � Penetration Testing
controls.description: Sandbox escape and code injection in penetration testing � adversarial scenarios before each deployment; Rogue agent scenarios in penetration testing � persistent hidden goal simulation, detection verification; Output injection scenarios in penetration testing � XSS, SQL injection via LLM output

controls.title: CIS 13 � Network Monitoring
controls.description: Code execution environments network-monitored � outbound connection attempts from sandbox detected

controls.control_id: 13.3 Deploy a network-based intrusion detection system
controls.title: CIS 13 � Network Monitoring
controls.description: Memory store access monitored � bulk read, anomalous write patterns detected

controls.title: CIS 12 � Network Infrastructure Management
controls.description: A2A communication channels mapped in network architecture � authentication method, encryption status

controls.title: CIS 3 � Data Protection
controls.description: All A2A messages encrypted in transit � no cleartext inter-agent communication

controls.title: CIS 12 � Network Infrastructure Management
controls.description: Network controls prevent cascade propagation across agent cluster boundaries

controls.title: CIS 17 � Incident Response
controls.description: Defined response for cascade events � kill switch activation, process control fallback, operations notification; Defined response for trust exploitation incidents � operator retraining, pattern audit, interface redesign; Defined response for LLM misinformation incidents � correction, notification, root cause

controls.title: CIS 8 � Audit Log Management
controls.description: Agent traffic monitored � cascade indicators detected before physical impact

controls.title: CIS 14 � Security Awareness and Skills Training
controls.description: All users of agentic tools trained on AI limitations � verification requirements, how to identify manipulation; User training on LLM data handling � what data should not be shared with LLMs; User training on LLM output limitations � verification requirements and critical evaluation

controls.title: CIS 13 � Network Monitoring and Defence
controls.description: Agent behavioural anomalies centralised and alerted � rogue agent patterns detected through SIEM

controls.title: CIS 17 � Incident Response
controls.description: Rogue agent containment as incident response procedure � kill switch, audit, state validation, forensic

controls.title: 3.1 — Establish and maintain data management process
CIS 16 � Application Software Security
controls.description: Code review for all LLM integration code � prompt injection patterns reviewed

controls.control_id: 3.1 Establish and maintain data management process
controls.title: CIS 3 � Data Protection
controls.description: Data classification and handling requirements applied to all LLM data assets

controls.control_id: 2.1 Establish and maintain software asset inventory
controls.title: CIS 2 � Inventory and Control of Software Assets
controls.description: ML SBOM maintained as part of software asset inventory � model versions, libraries, adapters

controls.title: CIS 7 � Continuous Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Automated scanning of training pipeline components � vulnerabilities in data processing libraries

controls.title: CIS 16 � Application Software Security
controls.description: Hardened training pipeline configurations � immutable infrastructure, locked data sources

controls.title: CIS 18 � Penetration Testing
controls.description: Poisoning scenarios in penetration testing � verify data integrity controls hold under attack

controls.title: CIS 8 � Audit Log Management
controls.description: Full audit trail of training data provenance and model training runs

controls.title: CIS 3 � Data Protection
controls.description: System prompts classified as sensitive configuration � data handling policy applied; RAG data governance � quality and freshness controls on retrieval sources

controls.title: CIS 7 � Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Vector database CVEs in vulnerability management process � CVE-2024-3584 and equivalents

controls.title: CIS 12 � Network Infrastructure Management
controls.description: Rate limiting and traffic controls at the API gateway and network layer

changelog.change: Initial seed — 18 CIS Controls v8.1 top-level safeguard groups
